author: SypherPK
text:
96 Fortnite Players HUNTED Me for the Rarest Sprite!
Today I'm getting HUNTED by Clix and his army for the rarest sprite in Fortnite. 
I hired XSET Higgs and LEGIQN to be my bodyguards, and they have to help me win the match or I'll lose my sprite for good. Enjoy!
